'''kalïfzïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kysse|kysse]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-l-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kysse|kysse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| kalïfzïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || kælïfzïfth || kælïfzïfj || kælïfzïfsh || kælïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || kalïflïfzïfth || kalïflïfzïfj || kalïflïfzïfsh || kalïflïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || kalïfzïfth || kalïfzïfj || kalïfzïfsh || kalïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || kalïffzïffth || kalïffzïffj || kalïffzïffsh || kalïffzïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || kalïfzïfïf || kalïfzïfïf || kalïfzïfïf || kalïfzïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || kalïfzïfth || kalïfzïfj || kalïfzïfsh || kalïfzïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || kalïfzïfïfl || kalïfzïfïfl || kalïfzïfïfl || kalïfzïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || kalïfzïfïfïf || kalïfzïfïfïf || kalïfzïfïfïf || kalïfzïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || kalïfzïfïfn || kalïfzïfïfn || kalïfzïfïfn || kalïfzïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || kalïfzïfïforo || kalïfzïfïforo || kalïfzïfïforo || kalïfzïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|b480631}}
